name: simple_matrix
title: Simple Matrix
description: A pivot matrix: one row group down the left, one column group across the top, and one aggregated value in the cells. Column headers use a dark-blue #305496 / white SemiBold band. Bind a row-group field, a column-group field, and a value field (with aggregate). Distilled from a Report Builder-authored matrix.

row_group.desc: Field whose distinct values become the rows.

column_group.desc: Field whose distinct values become the columns.

value.desc: Numeric field aggregated in the cells.
